name: Sukreeth Vandrangi
title: Software Engineer (Backend & AI)
summary:
AI-driven Software Engineer with 2 years of specialized experience in backend and AI solution
development for healthcare and finance. Proficient in building microservices, AI orchestration,
RAG pipelines, and predictive models using Python, Java, FastAPI, and AI/ML tools. Recognized
for pioneering AI-powered assistants and improving transaction workflow reliability, with strong
leadership in cloud infrastructure migration. Dedicated to advancing software engineering
through innovative AI applications.
skills:
LangGraph, MCP, RAG, Vector DB,
Python, FastAPI, Java Spring boot,
Microservices, Redis, Kafka, PostgreSQL,
MongoDB, Deep Learning, TensorFlow,
OpenCV, GCP, AWS, SQL, NoSQL, REST,
PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, Docker, Kubernetes,
Git, Gitlab, Data Structures

experience.title: Software Engineer (Backend & AI)
experience.subtitle: Ideyalabs
experience.desc:
A company focused on innovative technology solutions in AI and software development
- Helped design and build a domain-agnostic customer support agent platform with FastAPI based microservices, including chat-service schema design, SSE streaming for live responses, integrations with Confluence and Notion, and RAG pipelines using Pinecone with Adaptive-K retrieval, reranking, and LangGraph-based orchestration
- Developed core orchestration and data nodes for live and domain-specific tools, and implemented an MCP server(FastMCP) to plug a streaming-domain service (movies/shows/sports) into the custom built ReAct agent as a live tool.
- Developed and maintained backend services for a blockchain-backed B2B payments platform handling cross-border and domestic business transfers.
- Implemented EU SEPA payment flows end-to-end on top of existing SWIFT/ACH-based US rails using Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, Redis, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB.
- Improved reliability of transaction workflows by introducing SAGA-style coordination over Kafka, adding exponential backoff and resilient WebClient integrations for external payment APIs, fixing concurrent-update race conditions with targeted update queries, and preventing cache stampedes via locking and controlled cache refresh.
- Led infra work for a US freight/logistics platform’s F3 demo by migrating AWS SAM stacks to AWS CDK, significantly reducing database reset time.
- Built AI-powered healthcare assistants, including an intake-form chatbot with Rasa, OpenAI integration, and TTS.
- Developed a Celery/Redis-based document-processing pipeline combining OCR and LLMs.
- Created a RAG-based health assistant using LangChain and Chroma.
- Developed a diabetes risk prediction model using ensemble methods on NHANES data.
- Collaborated with clients, product, QA, and new dev teams, challenging requirements, uncovering edge cases, conducting knowledge-transfer sessions, and serving as a go-to engineer for end-to-end understanding of critical services.
